description:
Hi team,

Mateo here. Flagging that Box access for the vendor folder needs re-provisioning so we can pull the latest shoot deliverables. Happy to share more context on a quick call if useful.

Thanks,
Mateo
short_description: Box vendor folder access not provisioning

description:
Hi team,

Linda here. Flagging that the SSO login for the brand-client Confluence space is intermittently failing on the studio laptop. Happy to share more context on a quick call if useful.

Thanks,
Linda

Hi team,

Howard here. Flagging that the portfolio site checkout is throwing errors during the editorial gallery launch. Happy to share more context on a quick call if useful.

Thanks,
Howard
short_description: Portfolio checkout errors on gallery launch
